metadata.description: Binary classifiers predicting whether a model-task pair is within 2 difficulty levels of its capability boundary (d*) using CSD indicator features. Compared against single-feature threshold baselines via LOPO, LOTO, and LOMO cross-validation.

SPUQ-threshold (not run).source: 5 paraphrases per prompt (skipped: no API key)

metadata.label_definition: near_boundary=1 if difficulty >= d* - 2, else safe=0
